cases.prompt: 이 프로젝트에 CLAUDE.md 만들어줘. Claude Code 가 읽을 수 있게

assertions.text: The agent reads package.json (or equivalent) to infer the stack.
The CLAUDE.md lists dev server command, test command, lint command, and main browser URL.
The CLAUDE.md lists 'taboo' paths that should not be modified (e.g., migrations, lockfiles).
